parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Validation Tocken

participant "RemoteServiceServlet" as RSS << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant "HttpSessionCollector" as HSC << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant "SysLog" as SL << (L,#FFA500) >>
participant "Validation_User" as VU

-> RSS : Data Request
activate RSS

RSS -> RSS : Get Session ID_client
RSS -> HSC : Get Session by ID_client
activate HSC
HSC -> RSS : Session
deactivate HSC

RSS -> RSS : <color:gray>Validation Tockens</color>\n<color:green>True</color>
activate RSS #green
RSS -> VU : Access success
deactivate RSS

RSS -> RSS : <color:gray>Validation Tockens</color>\n<color:red>False</color>
activate RSS #red
RSS -[#orange]> SL : Tocken Failure (Name, Time)
<-[#red]- RSS : Access denied
deactivate RSS

deactivate RSS
@enduml
```
